data_text_check_furniture.inc.Text_PictureBookshelf: There's a set of POKéMON picture books.
data_text_check_furniture.inc.Text_Bookshelf: It's filled with all sorts of books.
data_text_check_furniture.inc.Text_Vase: This vase looks expensive...\nPeered inside...\pBut, it was empty.
data_text_check_furniture.inc.Text_ShopShelf: The shelves brim with all sorts of\nPOKéMON merchandise.
data_text_check_furniture.inc.Text_Blueprint: A blueprint of some sort?\nIt's too complicated!
